title: Future Texture
description: The latest version of texture and translation
body:
- Change Minecraft textures to future versions (localizations,mobs,blocks,items,armors...)

* Compatible with:
   - [Applied Energistics 2](/mod/ae2)
   - [Et Futurum Requiem](/mod/etfuturum)
   - [Industrial Craft](/mod/industrial-craft)
   - [Security Craft](/mod/security-craft)
